description: DASH-SYNTH-002: Test vectors for Omnipod DASH AES-CCM encryption/decryption

protocol.description: Omnipod DASH uses AES-CCM for message encryption with 8-byte MAC tag
protocol.nonce_format: prefix (8 bytes) + sequence number + pod_receiving flag

inputs.header_16_bytes: first 16 bytes of encrypted message packet

python_compat.description: Python AES-CCM encryption/decryption using cryptography library
python_compat.notes: Nonce construction requires understanding of Nonce.swift toData() method
